title: Video Player
description: Control an HTML5 video element using a ref to play/pause from a React component.
problemStatement:
Multimedia control! Attach a `useRef` to a `<video>` tag. Create two buttons: one that calls `.play()` on the video and one that calls `.pause()` on the video.

**Requirement:** Use the `current` property of the ref to access the DOM element.
hints: Refs are the standard way to interact with manual browser APIs like HTML5 Media.
expectedOutput: Buttons that can start and stop a video stream
